{{Quote|You impress me, Captain. One of the most important attributes of a good commander is the ability to think beyond his own expectations.|Admiral Gilad Pellaeon|<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>}}
'''Ardiff''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who held the rank of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] within the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He served as the commanding [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] of the notable [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II'']][[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|-class Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']]. In the years leading up to the peace accords between the [[Imperial Remnant]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as well as the rumors of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] return some [[19 ABY/Legends|nineteen years after]] the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. He was extremely loyal to his commanding officer and [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander of the Imperial Fleet]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] despite his misgivings of Pellaeon's planned meeting and eventual treaty with the New Republic. He was the commanding officer of the ''Chimaera'' during the signing of the [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Ardiff first appeared in the [[1997]] novel ''[[Specter of the Past]]'' by [[Timothy Zahn]]. He would later appeared in [[1998]] novel ''[[Vision of the Future]]''. Ardiff takes the place of Pellaeon during the Battle of Pesitiin, as he questioned his superior about the tactics he is making.
